title: QuickList
description: With QuickList you can search for any item in the Game by pressing [N] (by default), you can calculate things AND you have a nice To-Do List! (Inspired by Satisfactory)
body:
[![Join us on Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/Hv6NdCC5nf) [![Available on GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://www.github.com/Hajsori/QuickList)

With QuickList you can search for any item via EMI by simply pressing [N] AND you have a nice To-Do list :3

### Quicksearch + Calculator
By pressing [N] you can search for any item and calculate math-things
![Calculator and Quick Search](https://github.com/Hajsori/QuickList/blob/fabric/1.21.1/images/quicksearch.gif?raw=true)

### To-Do List
When you click on a item, you can add/remove it from the To-Do list by clicking the +/- buttons on the left
![To-Do List](https://github.com/Hajsori/QuickList/blob/fabric/1.21.1/images/todolist.gif?raw=true)

## NOTE:
To see the add/remove buttons for the To-Do list you need to change one thing in the EMI configuration
![Open Inventory -> EMI Config Button on the bottom left -> Show Recipe Decorators to true](https://github.com/Hajsori/QuickList/blob/fabric/1.21.1/images/emiconfig.gif?raw=true)


Credits:
- Both features (quick search and to-do list) are inspired by [Satisfactory](https://www.satisfactorygame.com/)
- Icon made with Microsoft Copilot (if you want to make a new one, pls contact me on Discord)
- Thanks to Emi for making the [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) Mod
- This Mod uses the [exp4j Library](https://www.objecthunter.net/exp4j/), which is licensed under the Apache License 2.0
